data.title: Blue Mini 3 Wheel Scooter for Kids – Lean-to-Steer with LED Light-Up Wheels, Adjustable Handlebar, Wide Anti-Slip Deck, Smoot

features: LED WHEELS FOR MAGICAL RIDES – Watch your child's face light up as they ride. The motion-activated LED wheels flash bright colors with every turn
making every scooting adventure extra fun. Plus
they add visibility for a safer ride in low light.

LEAN-TO-STEER CONTROL – No complicated turns or tricky maneuvers—just lean and go. This intuitive steering technology helps kids develop balance and coordination while making riding feel natural and effortless.
GROWS WITH YOUR CHILD – The adjustable T-bar handlebar offers four height settings (21.65’’
making this scooter the perfect ride for as young as 2 years old and growing kids up to 110 lbs.
WIDE AND SLIP-RESISTANT DECK – The anti-slip foot deck provides a secure grip
while the 3 wheel scooter design adds extra stability. Built with a durable and premium materials
it's made to withstand endless adventures.
SUPER SMOOTH WHEELS – The premium engineered polyurethane wheels ensure a smooth glide on both indoor and outdoor surfaces. The large 120mm front wheels and 80mm rear wheel absorb shocks
making every ride steady and enjoyable.

relatedProducts.Title: Gotrax KS3 Pro Folding Kick Scooter for Kids, One Key Removable Seat & 3 Extra Wide PU Light-Up Wheels and Anti-Slip Deck, Ad
relatedProducts.Features: EXCITING LIGHT-UP WHEELS: This KS3 PRO kick scooter is equipped with 3 extra wide bright LED wheels. The wheels illuminate as kids scoot, creating a super cool light effect day or night. This feature not only adds an extra layer of fun but also boosts safety and security. | GREAT SCOOTER FOR KIDS: The KS3 PRO scooter features Lean-to-Steer technology, promoting balance and coordination as kids turn by leaning. With one key removable seat, children can seamlessly transition between sitting and standing modes, ensuring a versatile riding experience. The handlebars can be set to 4 different heights (25.5/27.5/29.5/31.5 inches), making it perfect for children aged 2 years and above. | SMOOTH RIDE: Featuring front 5inch rear 3inch PU extra wide wheels, high-quality ABEC-7 Bearings, comfortable rubber handle grips, and an extra-wide non-slip deck(6 inches), the toddler scooter ensures exceptional stability and a smooth riding experience. The wide deck is complemented by a wide-foot brake allows for more steady stopping for kids. | FOLDABLE & PORTABLE: Designed with kids in mind, this compact scooter boasts a one-step fold mechanism for effortless storage and portability. The scooter is lightweight at just 8 pounds yet sturdy enough to hold riders up to 110 pounds. | EXCELLENT SERVICE: Gotrax offers a 1-year manufacturer's assurance, assuring that your kid's 3-wheel scooter is built to last. Any questions, please contact us at any time and we're happy to help!
